[These Dark shafts might be the prototypes of the modern
solar flares and sun-spots. The ancients must have observed these
appearing on the solar orb.

According to sage Parasara these are three comets named Angiras,
Knha and Kilaha, of which the first appears only on the solar orb,
while the other two on both the orbs. The first appears like a

130 Bfhat Samhita
human being armed with a bow and seated in a chariot. Kaka,
which is black (like Yama) and triangular in form, is of dreadful
effects. Kilaka, which is black and circular in form, brings about
hostilities among mighty kings and death of those whose natal star
is occupied by the luminary at the time. See also III, 7-J0 supra.]
There is another group of 120 comets known as Vifaarupa,
born of Agni (Fire).
